reference.text: 这是一段用于训练音色推理的参考文本

validated_samples.text: 这项测试还没有结束，请继续观察它的变化。

notes: This package is a local development template.
Replace the placeholder file paths with your own trained GPT-SoVITS voice package.
Do not commit model weights, reference audio, or generated samples unless distribution rights are confirmed.
